narrative:
Washington Local Sd (Lucas) school district has 35,458 registered voters, with 62.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.2 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.6% D−R vs +13.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
